contracts.note: SMH put buyers are aggressively lifting offers with volume at 6.5x open interest, and an additional 67k contracts traded this hour alone. The $14.5M premium spent on an 8.7% OTM strike with only 6 days to expiration suggests a strong conviction on a near-term downside move, with the 46% IV indicating the market is pricing in some volatility.

Trading below the bid with 90% IV and only 6 days to expiration suggests a tactical bet on a sharp downside move, though the relatively small $200k premium suggests it's not a massive conviction play.
